name: Schedule Reminder
description: Schedule a push notification/reminder to be sent to the user after a delay. Use this when the user asks to be reminded about something later (e.g. 'ingatkan saya mandi 10 menit lagi'). The notification will be sent to the same channel (Telegram/WhatsApp) the user is chatting on.

function.name: schedule_reminder
function.description: Schedule a push notification/reminder to the current user after a specified delay. The reminder is sent proactively to the user's current chat channel without waiting for the user to message first. Use this when the user explicitly asks to be reminded or notified about something in the future.

delay_minutes.description: Delay in minutes before sending the reminder. Must be a positive number. Example: 10 means 'remind me in 10 minutes'.

message.description: The reminder message to send to the user. Include all relevant context so the user knows what this is about. Example: 'Waktunya mandi! Anda minta diingatkan 10 menit yang lalu.'

mock_response.detail: Reminder scheduled! I'll notify you in 10 minute(s): "Waktunya mandi!"
